spells.name: Acid Splash
spells.description: You hurl a bubble of acid. Choose one or two creatures within range that are within 5 feet of each other. A target must succeed on a DEX saving throw or take 1d6 acid damage. This spell's damage increases by 1d6 at 5th, 11th, and 17th level.

spells.name: Blade Ward
spells.description: You extend your hand and trace a sigil of warding in the air. Until the end of your next turn, you have resistance against bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage dealt by weapon attacks.

spells.name: Booming Blade
spells.description: You brandish the weapon used in the spell's casting and make a melee attack with it. On a hit, the target suffers the attack's normal effects, and it becomes sheathed in booming energy. If the target willingly moves before the start of your next turn, it takes 1d8 thunder damage.

spells.name: Chill Touch
spells.description: You create a ghostly skeletal hand in the space of a creature within range. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit: 1d8 necrotic damage, target can't regain HP until start of your next turn. Undead also have disadvantage on attacks against you.

spells.name: Dancing Lights
spells.description: You create up to four torch-sized lights within range, making them appear as torches, lanterns, or glowing orbs. You can combine them into one glowing vaguely humanoid form. Each sheds dim light in a 10-foot radius.

spells.name: Druidcraft
spells.description: Whispering to the spirits of nature, you create one of the following effects: predict weather, make a flower bloom, create sensory effects like rustling leaves, or light/snuff a small flame.

spells.name: Eldritch Blast
spells.description: A beam of crackling energy streaks toward a creature. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit: 1d10 force damage. The spell creates more beams as you reach higher levels — two at 5th, three at 11th, four at 17th.

spells.name: Fire Bolt
spells.description: A mote of fire streaks toward a creature. Ranged spell attack. Hit: 1d10 fire damage. Flammable objects ignite. Damage increases by 1d10 at 5th, 11th, 17th level.

spells.name: Friends
spells.description: For the duration, you have advantage on all CHA checks directed at one creature of your choice. When the spell ends, the creature realizes it was charmed.

spells.name: Frostbite
spells.description: You cause numbing frost to form on one creature. CON save or 1d6 cold damage and disadvantage on the next weapon attack roll before end of its next turn.

spells.name: Green-Flame Blade
spells.description: Melee weapon attack. On hit: normal damage + green fire leaps to another creature within 5 feet (INT mod fire damage). Both effects increase at 5th, 11th, 17th level.

spells.name: Guidance
spells.description: Touch one willing creature. Once before the spell ends, the target can roll 1d4 and add the number to one ability check of its choice.

spells.name: Infestation
spells.description: You cause a cloud of mites, fleas, and other parasites to appear momentarily on one creature. CON save or 1d6 poison damage and move 5 feet in a random direction.

spells.name: Light
spells.description: Touch one object no larger than 10 feet. Sheds bright light in 20 feet, dim light 20 more. If a creature is in darkness, it can make a DEX save to avoid. Extinguish by casting again or covering.

spells.name: Mage Hand
spells.description: A spectral floating hand appears. Use your action to control it: manipulate objects, open doors/containers, stow/retrieve items. Can't attack or carry more than 10 pounds.

spells.name: Mending
spells.description: This spell repairs a single break or tear in an object you touch, such as a broken chain link, two halves of a key, a torn cloak, or a leaking wineskin. As long as the break is no larger than 1 foot, you mend it.

spells.name: Message
spells.description: Point at a creature, whisper a message. Only that creature hears it and can whisper a reply only you can hear. Doesn't have to be line of sight if you know the target and it's in the same building.

spells.name: Minor Illusion
spells.description: Create a sound or image of an object within range that lasts for the duration. A sound can be a whisper or thunder. An image must fit in a 5-foot cube and can't create sound, light, smell, or other sensory effects.

spells.name: Poison Spray
spells.description: Extend your hand toward a creature you can see within range and project a puff of toxic mist. CON save or take 1d12 poison damage.

spells.name: Prestidigitation
spells.description: Minor magical tricks: create a sensory effect, light/snuff a flame, clean/soil an object, chill or warm material, make a color mark, or create a small trinket. Up to 3 effects active at once.

spells.name: Produce Flame
spells.description: A flickering flame appears in your hand. Sheds bright light 10 feet, dim 10 more. As an action, throw it (30 ft range): ranged spell attack for 1d8 fire damage.

spells.name: Ray of Frost
spells.description: A frigid beam of blue-white light streaks toward a creature. Ranged spell attack. Hit: 1d8 cold damage, target's speed reduced by 10 ft until start of your next turn.

spells.name: Resistance
spells.description: Touch one willing creature. Once before spell ends, roll 1d4 and add to one saving throw of its choice.

spells.name: Sacred Flame
spells.description: Flame-like radiance descends on a creature you can see. DEX save or 1d8 radiant damage. No benefit from cover for this save.

spells.name: Shillelagh
spells.description: The wood of a club or quarterstaff you are holding is imbued with nature's power. Use your spellcasting ability instead of STR, and the weapon deals 1d8 damage.

spells.name: Shocking Grasp
spells.description: Lightning springs from your hand. Melee spell attack (+advantage vs. metal armor). Hit: 1d8 lightning damage, can't take reactions until start of its next turn.

spells.name: Spare the Dying
spells.description: Touch a living creature with 0 hit points. The creature becomes stable. This has no effect on undead or constructs.

spells.name: Thaumaturgy
spells.description: Manifest a minor wonder: your voice booms, flames flicker, tremors shake the ground, your eyes glow, doors slam, or you alter a creature's appearance. Up to 3 effects simultaneously.

spells.name: Thunderclap
spells.description: You create a burst of thunderous sound. Each creature within 5 feet must succeed on a CON saving throw or take 1d6 thunder damage. The sound can be heard 100 feet away.

spells.name: Toll the Dead
spells.description: Point at one creature. WIS save or 1d8 necrotic (1d12 if already missing HP). Damage increases at 5th, 11th, 17th level.

spells.name: True Strike
spells.description: You extend your hand and point a finger at a target. Your magic grants you a brief insight into the target's defenses. On your next turn, you gain advantage on your first attack roll against the target.

spells.name: Vicious Mockery
spells.description: Unleash a string of insults at a creature you can see. WIS save or 1d4 psychic damage and disadvantage on its next attack roll.

spells.name: Word of Radiance
spells.description: You utter a divine word, and burning radiance erupts from you. Each creature of your choice within 5 feet must succeed on a CON saving throw or take 1d6 radiant damage.

spells.name: Alarm
spells.description: Set an alarm against unwanted intrusion. Choose a door, window, or area up to 20-foot cube. Mental ping or audible alarm when a Tiny or larger creature enters the warded area.

spells.name: Animal Friendship
spells.description: Convince a beast that you mean no harm. WIS save (if INT 4 or higher, automatic success) or charmed. Beast friendly to you for duration.

spells.name: Armor of Agathys
spells.description: A protective magical force surrounds you, giving you 5 temporary HP. If a creature hits you while you have these temp HP, it takes 5 cold damage. +5 temp HP and +5 cold damage per slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Bane
spells.description: Up to 3 creatures you can see must make CHA saves. On fail: subtract 1d4 from attack rolls and saving throws until spell ends.

spells.name: Bless
spells.description: Bless up to 3 creatures. Affected creatures add 1d4 to attack rolls and saving throws. +1 target per slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Burning Hands
spells.description: A thin sheet of flames shoots from your outstretched fingertips. DEX save. Fail: 3d6 fire, success: half. +1d6 per slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Charm Person
spells.description: WIS save (advantage if in combat). Fail: charmed—friendly to you. Creature knows it was charmed when it ends. +1 target per slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Color Spray
spells.description: A dazzling array of flashing colors springs from your hand. Roll 6d10 and add together. Starting with the creature with the lowest current HP in the area, creatures are blinded until end of your next turn.

spells.name: Command
spells.description: Speak a one-word command to a creature. WIS save or obey on its next turn. Commands: Approach, Drop, Flee, Grovel, Halt. +1 target per slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Comprehend Languages
spells.description: For the duration, you understand the literal meaning of any spoken language. Also understand written language if you touch the surface it's written on. 1 minute per page.

spells.name: Cure Wounds
spells.description: A creature you touch regains 1d8 + spellcasting ability modifier HP. No effect on undead or constructs. +1d8 per slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Detect Evil and Good
spells.description: Know if there is an aberration, celestial, elemental, fey, fiend, or undead within 30 feet. Also know if an object/location has been consecrated or desecrated.

spells.name: Detect Magic
spells.description: Sense the presence of magic within 30 feet. Use action to see a faint aura around visible magical creatures/objects, and learn the school of magic if any.

spells.name: Disguise Self
spells.description: Make yourself appear different: hair, facial features, clothing, armor, etc. Must be humanoid, same body proportions. INV check DC vs. spell save DC to see through.

spells.name: Divine Favor
spells.description: Your prayer empowers you with divine radiance. Weapon attacks deal an extra 1d4 radiant damage on a hit for the duration.

spells.name: Earth Tremor
spells.description: You cause a tremor in the ground. Each creature within range must make a DEX save. On fail: 1d6 bludgeoning damage and knocked prone if on ground. Ground becomes difficult terrain.

spells.name: Entangle
spells.description: Grasping weeds and vines sprout in a 20-foot square from a point within range. STR save or restrained for duration. Plants make the area difficult terrain.

spells.name: Expeditious Retreat
spells.description: This spell allows you to move at an incredible pace. When you cast the spell and as a bonus action each turn until the spell ends, you can take the Dash action.

spells.name: Faerie Fire
spells.description: Each object in a 20-foot cube lights up in blue, green, or violet light. DEX save or outlined in light—attacks have advantage against them, can't benefit from invisibility.

spells.name: False Life
spells.description: Bolstering yourself with a necromantic facsimile of life, you gain 1d4+4 temporary HP. +5 temp HP per slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Feather Fall
spells.description: Choose up to 5 falling creatures within range. The creatures' rate of descent slows to 60 feet per round. A creature landing before the spell ends takes no falling damage.

spells.name: Fog Cloud
spells.description: You create a 20-foot-radius sphere of fog centered on a point within range. The sphere spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. +20 feet radius per slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Goodberry
spells.description: Up to 10 berries imbued with magic appear. Eating one as an action restores 1 HP. The berries lose potency after 24 hours.

spells.name: Grease
spells.description: Slick grease covers a 10-foot square. Each creature standing there must make DEX save or fall prone. Entering the area also requires DEX save.

spells.name: Guiding Bolt
spells.description: Ranged spell attack. Hit: 4d6 radiant damage and the target sheds dim light, making the next attack against it before end of your next turn have advantage. +1d6 per slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Healing Word
spells.description: A creature of your choice within range regains HP equal to 1d4 + your spellcasting ability modifier. No effect on undead/constructs. +1d4 per slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Hellish Rebuke
spells.description: In response to being damaged, you point at the attacker. DEX save or 2d10 fire damage (half on success). +1d10 per slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Heroism
spells.description: A willing creature gains immunity to frightened and gains temporary HP equal to your spellcasting modifier at the start of each of its turns for the duration. +1 target per slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Hunter's Mark
spells.description: Choose a creature—deal an extra 1d6 damage to it whenever you hit it with a weapon attack, and you have advantage on Perception/Survival checks to find it. Move mark as bonus action.

spells.name: Ice Knife
spells.description: You create a shard of ice and fling it at one creature. Ranged spell attack. Hit: 1d10 piercing. Then explodes: DEX save or 2d6 cold in 5-foot radius. +1d6 cold per slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Identify
spells.description: Touch one magic item or object. Learn its properties, how to use them, whether it requires attunement, and how many charges it has. Also learn spells affecting a creature you touch.

spells.name: Inflict Wounds
spells.description: Make a melee spell attack against a creature you reach. On hit: 3d10 necrotic damage. +1d10 per slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Jump
spells.description: Touch a creature. Its jump distance is tripled until the spell ends.

spells.name: Longstrider
spells.description: Touch a creature. Its speed increases by 10 feet until the spell ends. +1 target per slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Magic Missile
spells.description: Three glowing darts of magical force each deal 1d4+1 force damage, all hitting simultaneously. +1 dart per slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Protection from Evil and Good
spells.description: Ward against aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, undead. They have disadvantage on attacks, can't charm/frighten/possess the target.

spells.name: Shield of Faith
spells.description: A shimmering field appears around a creature, giving it +2 AC for the duration.

spells.name: Shield
spells.description: An invisible barrier of magical force appears. +5 AC until start of next turn (including against triggering attack). Immune to Magic Missile.

spells.name: Silent Image
spells.description: Create a visual illusion of an object, creature, or phenomenon up to 15-foot cube. No sound, smell, or other sensory effects. INV check DC vs spell save to see through.

spells.name: Sleep
spells.description: Roll 5d8. Creatures with current HP at or below the total fall unconscious (lowest HP first). Undead and immune creatures unaffected. Wakes on damage or shaking. +2d8 per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Speak with Animals
spells.description: Comprehend and verbally communicate with beasts for the duration. Knowledge limited to their INT and experience. They may refuse requests. Beasts won't attack you unless provoked.

spells.name: Thunderwave
spells.description: CON save. Fail: 2d8 thunder damage and pushed 10 feet. Success: half, not pushed. Unsecured objects also pushed. Sound heard 300 feet. +1d8 per slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Unseen Servant
spells.description: Invisible mindless undirected force that can carry objects, clean, mend, and perform other simple tasks. STR 2, can't attack, can't carry more than 10 pounds. Uses action to direct.

spells.name: Witch Bolt
spells.description: Ranged spell attack. Hit: 1d12 lightning damage. On subsequent turns, use action to deal 1d12 again automatically (breaks if out of range or breaks concentration). +1d12 per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Wrathful Smite
spells.description: Next weapon hit: +1d6 psychic damage and WIS save or frightened until spell ends (action to repeat save each turn).

spells.name: Blur
spells.description: Your body becomes blurred. Attackers have disadvantage on attack rolls against you unless they use blindsight or truesight.

spells.name: Crown of Madness
spells.description: WIS save or charmed. Iron crown sprouts on head. Use action each turn or spell ends to direct target to attack a creature of your choice (not you).

spells.name: Darkvision
spells.description: Grant a willing creature darkvision out to 60 feet for the duration.

spells.name: Enhance Ability
spells.description: Choose one ability score. Grant advantage on checks using that ability. Bear's Endurance: +2d6 temp HP. Bull's Strength: double carry capacity. Cat's Grace: no fall damage ≤20 ft. Eagle's Splendor: advantage on CHA. Fox's Cunning: INT. Owl's Wisdom: WIS. +1 target per slot above 2nd.

spells.name: Enthrall
spells.description: You weave a distracting string of words. WIS save or creature has disadvantage on Perception checks directed at anyone other than you. Immune if deafened.

spells.name: Find Steed
spells.description: Summon a spirit that takes the form of an unusually intelligent mount (warhorse, pony, camel, elk, mastiff, etc.). The steed shares your alignment and can communicate telepathically.

spells.name: Find Traps
spells.description: Sense the presence of traps within range and line of sight. Traps in common usage include anything designed to cause sudden or unexpected harm.

spells.name: Flaming Sphere
spells.description: A 5-foot-diameter sphere of fire appears. DEX save for adjacent creatures or 2d6 fire (half on success). Bonus action to move 30 feet. +1d6 per slot above 2nd.

spells.name: Gentle Repose
spells.description: Touch a corpse or remains. Protected from decay and can't become undead for the duration. Extends the time limit for Revivify and similar spells.

spells.name: Gust of Wind
spells.description: A line of strong wind 60 feet long, 10 feet wide. STR save or pushed 15 feet. Difficult terrain in line. Extinguishes flames, disperses gas, affects ranged attacks.

spells.name: Hold Person
spells.description: WIS save or paralyzed. Repeat save at end of each turn. Attacks against it with advantage, hits within 5 feet auto-crit. +1 target per slot above 2nd.

spells.name: Invisibility
spells.description: Creature and equipment invisible until it attacks or casts a spell. +1 target per slot above 2nd.

spells.name: Knock
spells.description: Loudly open a lock, stuck door, container, or shackles (3 effects per casting). Audible 300 feet away.

spells.name: Lesser Restoration
spells.description: Touch a creature to end one disease or one condition: blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned.

spells.name: Levitate
spells.description: A creature or object (500 lb max) rises up to 20 feet into the air. CON save for unwilling creatures. Can rise/descend 20 feet per turn.

spells.name: Locate Object
spells.description: Sense direction of known object within 1000 feet. Can be a general type you've seen before. Blocked by lead.

spells.name: Magic Weapon
spells.description: Nonmagical weapon becomes +1 magic weapon. +2 at 4th level slot, +3 at 6th level slot.

spells.name: Mirror Image
spells.description: Three illusory duplicates of yourself appear. When a creature attacks you, roll d20 (3 duplicates: 6+, 2: 8+, 1: 11+) to have the attack hit a duplicate instead. Destroyed on hit.

spells.name: Misty Step
spells.description: Briefly surrounded by silvery mist, you teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.

spells.name: Moonbeam
spells.description: A pale beam of light shines in a 5-foot-radius, 40-foot-tall cylinder. CON save or 2d10 radiant (half success). Shapechangers auto-fail. Move beam 60 feet as bonus action. +1d10 per slot above 2nd.

spells.name: Pass without Trace
spells.description: A veil of shadows and silence radiates from you. You and each creature you choose within 30 feet gain +10 to Stealth checks and can't be tracked except by magical means.

spells.name: Prayer of Healing
spells.description: Up to 6 creatures regain 2d8 + spellcasting modifier HP. +1d8 per slot level above 2nd.

spells.name: Protection from Poison
spells.description: Neutralize one poison affecting the target. For the duration, the target has advantage on saves against poison and resistance against poison damage.

spells.name: Ray of Enfeeblement
spells.description: Ranged spell attack. Hit: target deals half damage with STR-based weapon attacks. CON save at end of each turn to end effect.

spells.name: Scorching Ray
spells.description: Create 3 rays of fire. Separate ranged spell attack for each. Hit: 2d6 fire. +1 ray per slot level above 2nd.

spells.name: Shatter
spells.description: Painful ringing sound at a point. CON save or 3d8 thunder damage (half success). Inorganic objects auto-fail. +1d8 per slot above 2nd.

spells.name: Silence
spells.description: 20-foot-radius sphere. No sound in or out. Creatures within are deafened. Can't cast spells with verbal components inside.

spells.name: Spike Growth
spells.description: Ground in 20-foot radius becomes difficult terrain covered with spikes. For every 5 feet traveled, 2d4 piercing damage. Spikes are disguised (Perception vs spell save DC to detect).

spells.name: Spiritual Weapon
spells.description: Create a floating spectral weapon. Bonus action each turn: move 20 ft and make spell attack. Hit: 1d8 + spellcasting mod force. +1d8 per 2 slot levels above 2nd.

spells.name: Suggestion
spells.description: WIS save or follow a reasonable course of action described in 1-2 sentences. Ends if the suggestion becomes harmful.

spells.name: Web
spells.description: 20-foot cube of sticky webs. DEX save or restrained. STR save (DC your spell DC) as action to escape. Flammable: 2d4 fire damage, burns in 1 round.

spells.name: Animate Dead
spells.description: Create a skeleton or zombie servant (pile of bones or corpse). Obeys your verbal commands. 24 hours, then needs a new casting. +2 undead per slot above 3rd.

spells.name: Bestow Curse
spells.description: Melee spell attack or WIS save to avoid. Choose a curse: disadvantage on an ability score's checks/saves, disadvantage on attacks against you, or extra necrotic damage. Higher slots = longer duration.

spells.name: Blink
spells.description: At end of each turn, roll d20. On 11+: vanish to Ethereal Plane, returning at start of next turn within 10 feet. While ethereal, can see material plane 60 feet.

spells.name: Call Lightning
spells.description: Storm cloud appears. Each turn as action: lightning strike within 100 ft, 60 ft below cloud. DEX save or 3d10 lightning (4d10 in actual storm). +1d10 per slot above 3rd.

spells.name: Clairvoyance
spells.description: Create invisible sensor at known location (same plane). See or hear through it. Can switch between seeing and hearing each turn.

spells.name: Conjure Animals
spells.description: Summon fey spirits as beasts. Choose: one CR 2, two CR 1, four CR 1/2, or eight CR 1/4. They obey your commands.

spells.name: Counterspell
spells.description: Interrupt a spell being cast. Automatically negates spell of 3rd level or lower. For higher level: spellcasting ability check DC 10 + spell level to negate.

spells.name: Create Food and Water
spells.description: Creates 45 pounds of food and 30 gallons of water, enough for 15 humanoids (or 5 steeds) for 24 hours. Food spoils after 24 hours.

spells.name: Daylight
spells.description: 60-foot-radius sphere of light from a point or object. Bright light overrides darkness spells of 3rd level or lower. Can be blocked by opaque objects.

spells.name: Dispel Magic
spells.description: Automatically end spells of 3rd level or lower on target. For higher level: spellcasting ability check DC 10 + spell level.

spells.name: Fear
spells.description: WIS save or drop held items and become frightened (must use movement to flee). Repeat save at end of each turn if can't see you.

spells.name: Fireball
spells.description: Bright streak explodes in 20-foot radius. DEX save. Fail: 8d6 fire. Success: half. Ignites flammable objects. +1d6 per slot above 3rd.

spells.name: Fly
spells.description: Target gains fly speed of 60 feet. When spell ends, target falls unless it can stop or slow the fall. +1 target per slot above 3rd.

spells.name: Gaseous Form
spells.description: Transform willing creature into a misty cloud: fly 10 ft, can't attack/cast spells, immune to nonmagical damage, can pass through narrow openings.

spells.name: Glyph of Warding
spells.description: Inscribe a glyph on a surface or object. Set trigger conditions. When triggered: blast glyph (5d8 of chosen energy, DEX save for half) or spell glyph (store a spell of 3rd level or lower).

spells.name: Haste
spells.description: Speed doubled, +2 AC, advantage on DEX saves. Can take one additional action (attack, dash, disengage, hide, use object). When spell ends, target can't act until after its next turn.

spells.name: Hunger of Hadar
spells.description: Open a gateway to dark void between stars in 20-foot radius sphere. Heavily obscured, bitter cold, tentacles. Start of turn: CON save or 2d6 cold. End of turn: DEX save or 2d6 acid.

spells.name: Hypnotic Pattern
spells.description: Twisting pattern in 30-foot cube. WIS save or charmed and incapacitated, speed 0. Ends if they take damage or another creature uses action to shake them out of it.

spells.name: Lightning Bolt
spells.description: 100-foot long, 5-foot wide line of lightning. DEX save. Fail: 8d8 lightning. Success: half. Ignites flammable objects. +1d8 per slot above 3rd.

spells.name: Magic Circle
spells.description: 10-foot-radius, 20-foot-tall cylinder ward. Choose: celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, or undead. They have disadvantage on attacks against creatures inside, can't possess them, and can't cross the barrier.

spells.name: Mass Healing Word
spells.description: Up to 6 creatures regain 1d4 + spellcasting modifier HP. +1d4 per slot above 3rd.

spells.name: Nondetection
spells.description: Target is hidden from divination magic. Can't be targeted by scrying, can't be perceived through magical sensors.

spells.name: Plant Growth
spells.description: Instant cast: plants in 100-foot radius become overgrown difficult terrain. 8-hour cast: land in half-mile radius enriched for 1 year, doubling crop yields.

spells.name: Remove Curse
spells.description: Touch a creature to end all curses affecting it. If item is cursed, the curse remains but the creature is no longer attuned to it.

spells.name: Revivify
spells.description: Touch a creature that died within the last minute. It returns to life with 1 HP. Doesn't restore missing body parts.

spells.name: Sending
spells.description: Send a telepathic message of up to 25 words to a creature you are familiar with. The creature can respond with up to 25 words. Works across planes.

spells.name: Sleet Storm
spells.description: Freezing rain and sleet in 20-foot-radius, 40-foot-tall cylinder. Area is heavily obscured and difficult terrain. Concentration spells: DC 10 CON save. Creatures entering: DEX save or fall prone.

spells.name: Slow
spells.description: Up to 6 creatures WIS save or: speed halved, -2 AC and DEX saves, can't use reactions, only one action or bonus action (not both) per turn, can't make more than one attack per action.

spells.name: Speak with Dead
spells.description: A corpse answers up to 5 questions. Must have a mouth. Knows what it knew in life. Hostile in life = uncooperative. Doesn't know afterlife info.

spells.name: Spirit Guardians
spells.description: Spirits swirl around you in 15-foot radius. Choose creatures; they have halved speed. When entering area: WIS save or 3d8 radiant/necrotic (half on success). +1d8 per slot above 3rd.

spells.name: Stinking Cloud
spells.description: 20-foot-radius sphere of yellow-green fog, heavily obscured. CON save on entering or starting turn in it or spend action retching (can't take actions or bonus actions that turn).

spells.name: Tongues
spells.description: Target can understand any spoken language. When target speaks, any creature that knows at least one language can understand it.

spells.name: Vampiric Touch
spells.description: Melee spell attack each turn. Hit: 3d6 necrotic, gain HP equal to half. +1d6 per slot above 3rd.

spells.name: Water Breathing
spells.description: Up to 10 willing creatures can breathe underwater for the duration. Doesn't affect the ability to breathe air.

spells.name: Wind Wall
spells.description: Strong wind rises in a wall (50 ft long, 15 ft high, 1 ft thick). STR save or 3d8 bludgeoning (half success). Creatures passing through knocked prone. Blocks gas, wind, small projectiles.

spells.name: Blight
spells.description: CON save or 8d8 necrotic (half success). No effect on undead/constructs. Plants auto-fail and take max damage. +1d8 per slot above 4th.

spells.name: Compulsion
spells.description: WIS save or compelled to move each turn in a direction you choose. Can still attack or cast spells. Repeat WIS save at end of each turn.

spells.name: Confusion
spells.description: WIS save or confused (roll d10 each turn for random behavior). Repeat save at end of each turn. +1 target per slot above 4th.

spells.name: Death Ward
spells.description: First time target would drop to 0 HP: drop to 1 HP instead and spell ends. Also negates instant-death effects that would kill without reducing to 0 HP.

spells.name: Dimension Door
spells.description: Teleport yourself and up to one willing creature within 5 feet to any location within range you can visualize.

spells.name: Divination
spells.description: Receive an omen from your divine contact about the next 30 minutes of activity you describe. True, false, or unclear response.

spells.name: Freedom of Movement
spells.description: Ignore difficult terrain and magical effects that reduce speed. Can't be restrained (spells or nonmagical means), paralyzed, or incapacitated against your will. Escape grapples freely.

spells.name: Greater Invisibility
spells.description: Target becomes invisible. Unlike Invisibility, doesn't end when attacking or casting spells.

spells.name: Guardian of Faith
spells.description: Large spectral guardian appears. Hostile creatures within 10 feet: DEX save or 20 radiant damage (half on success). Guardian disappears after dealing 60 total damage.

spells.name: Ice Storm
spells.description: 20-foot radius, 40-foot-tall cylinder. DEX save. Fail: 2d8 bludgeoning + 4d6 cold. Success: half. Area becomes difficult terrain. +1d8 bludgeoning per slot above 4th.

spells.name: Locate Creature
spells.description: Sense direction of a specific creature you have seen or a general type within 1000 feet. Blocked by running water.

spells.name: Polymorph
spells.description: WIS save for unwilling. Transform into beast with CR ≤ own CR (or level). Uses beast's stats. Reverts if reduced to 0 HP (excess damage carries over). Concentration breaks if incapacitated.

spells.name: Stone Shape
spells.description: Touch stone Medium or smaller. Shape it into any form that fits in a 5-foot cube. Can create crude weapons, passageways, or statues.

spells.name: Stoneskin
spells.description: Target gains resistance to nonmagical bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage.

spells.name: Wall of Fire
spells.description: Wall up to 60 ft long, 20 ft high, 1 ft thick (or 20-ft-diameter ring). DEX save on entering or start of turn within 10 ft: 5d8 fire (half on success). Choose which side deals damage. +1d8 per slot above 4th.

spells.name: Banishment
spells.description: CHA save or banished. Native plane: helpless demiplane. If concentration maintained for 1 minute, permanently banished (if extraplanar) or returns at end. +1 target per slot above 4th.

spells.name: Cone of Cold
spells.description: CON save. Fail: 8d8 cold. Success: half. Killed creatures become frozen statues until thawed. +1d8 per slot above 5th.

spells.name: Conjure Elemental
spells.description: Summon an elemental (air, earth, fire, or water) of CR 5 or lower. If concentration breaks, elemental goes free and possibly hostile.

spells.name: Contact Other Plane
spells.description: Contact a deity or far realm entity for 5 short-answer questions. INT save DC 15 or go insane (5d6 psychic, confused 1d10 days). Entity answers: yes/no/unclear/doesn't know.

spells.name: Dominate Person
spells.description: WIS save or charmed and under your control. Repeat save when damaged. Use bonus action to command. +1 slot level = longer duration (2: 10 min, 3: 1 hour, 4: 8 hours).

spells.name: Dream
spells.description: Enter dreams of a sleeping creature you know. Can shape a pleasant dream or a nightmare (WIS save or 3d6 psychic, no benefit from rest).

spells.name: Flame Strike
spells.description: Divine fire falls in a 10-foot-radius, 40-foot-tall cylinder. DEX save. Fail: 4d6 fire + 4d6 radiant. Success: half. +1d6 fire + 1d6 radiant per slot above 5th.

spells.name: Geas
spells.description: WIS save or compelled to carry out your service or refrain from an activity. Taking 5d10 psychic damage when acting against the compulsion. Higher slots: 1 year (7th), permanent (9th).

spells.name: Greater Restoration
spells.description: Touch a creature to end: one effect reducing ability score, one curse (including attunement to a cursed item), one effect reducing max HP, or one effect: charmed, frightened, paralyzed, petrified.

spells.name: Hold Monster
spells.description: WIS save or paralyzed. Repeat at end of each turn. Unlike Hold Person, works on all creatures. +1 target per slot above 5th.

spells.name: Legend Lore
spells.description: Name or describe a legendary person, place, or object. DM tells you summary lore about it. Not created by mortals, so not affected by false information.

spells.name: Mass Cure Wounds
spells.description: Up to 6 creatures regain 3d8 + spellcasting modifier HP. No effect on undead/constructs. +1d8 per slot above 5th.

spells.name: Mislead
spells.description: Become invisible and create illusory double of yourself. Move double up to twice your speed as a bonus action. See/hear through double's senses.

spells.name: Modify Memory
spells.description: WIS save or charmed. Must be in conversation with target. Alter memory of last 24 hours: erase, enhance, distort, or implant. Memory lasts indefinitely.

spells.name: Passwall
spells.description: Create a passage up to 20 feet deep through wood, plaster, or stone. Passage is 5 feet wide and 8 feet tall.

spells.name: Planar Binding
spells.description: CHA save or bound to your service for the duration. Use higher slots for longer duration. Creature obeys commands but tries to twist them.

spells.name: Raise Dead
spells.description: Resurrect creature dead ≤10 days. Must have most of body. Loses negative levels on death. Returns with 1 HP, all exhaustion, and -4 to attack/save/ability checks until long rest.

spells.name: Reincarnate
spells.description: Weave life magic around a dead creature dead ≤10 days. Reborn in a new humanoid body (roll d100 for race). Retains all memories and class features.

spells.name: Scrying
spells.description: WIS save to resist (modified by familiarity). Sensor appears near target. See and hear through it.

spells.name: Seeming
spells.description: Change appearance of all creatures in range (with consent). INV vs. spell save DC to see through. Physical interaction reveals illusion.

spells.name: Telekinesis
spells.description: Move creature or object with your mind. Creature (up to Huge): contested STR vs. spell save or moved 30 ft. Object (up to 1,000 lb): move 30 ft per turn.

spells.name: Tree Stride
spells.description: Enter a tree and emerge from another of the same kind within 500 feet (your move speed per turn, can re-enter).

spells.name: Wall of Force
spells.description: Invisible wall of force, immune to all damage. Not dispelled by Dispel Magic but can be destroyed by Disintegrate. Can be flat (10 panels of 10×10 ft) or a sphere (10-ft radius).

spells.name: Chain Lightning
spells.description: Primary target: DEX save or 10d8 lightning (half on success). Up to 3 secondary targets within 30 feet of primary: same save and damage.

spells.name: Circle of Death
spells.description: 60-foot-radius sphere of negative energy. CON save or 8d6 necrotic (half success). +2d6 per slot above 6th.

spells.name: Create Undead
spells.description: Create ghoul (or higher with higher slots) from a corpse. Serves you. Must recast within 24 hours to maintain control.

spells.name: Disintegrate
spells.description: DEX save or 10d6+40 force damage. If this reduces HP to 0: turned to fine gray dust. Objects and magical barriers also affected. +3d6 per slot above 6th.

spells.name: Eyebite
spells.description: Each turn, target one creature. WIS save or: asleep (INT ≤ 10), panicked, or sickened (disadvantage + no reactions).

spells.name: Globe of Invulnerability
spells.description: 10-foot-radius sphere. Spells of 5th level or lower can't enter (5th + slot level for higher slots).

spells.name: Harm
spells.description: CON save or 14d6 necrotic damage (half on success, min 0). Also reduces max HP by damage dealt until long rest. No effect on undead/constructs.

spells.name: Heal
spells.description: Restore 70 HP and end blindness, deafness, and disease. +10 HP per slot above 6th.

spells.name: Heroes' Feast
spells.description: A feast for up to 12 creatures: cured of disease/poison, immune to poison and frightened, WIS +1 (24 hrs), +2d10 max HP and current HP (24 hrs), advantage on WIS saves (24 hrs).

spells.name: Mass Suggestion
spells.description: WIS save or follow reasonable suggestion for duration. Up to 12 creatures. Higher slots: longer duration.

spells.name: Move Earth
spells.description: Reshape dirt, sand, or clay in a 40-foot cube. Excavate or raise terrain up to 10 feet. Each action moves terrain up to 40 feet. Takes time (DM's discretion).

spells.name: Sunbeam
spells.description: 60-foot line, 5 feet wide. CON save or 6d8 radiant (half success). Blinded until start of next turn. Undead: disadvantage on save. Emit bright light 30 ft, dim 30 ft for duration.

spells.name: True Seeing
spells.description: Grant truesight 120 ft, notice secret doors hidden by magic, and see into Ethereal Plane, all up to 120 feet.

spells.name: Arcane Gate
spells.description: Create two linked portals (up to 500 ft apart, both visible). Passing through one exits the other.

spells.name: Etherealness
spells.description: Enter Ethereal Plane. See/hear material plane. Move in any direction (up/down = half speed). Pass through solid objects. Return to material whenever you want. +1 target per slot above 7th.

spells.name: Finger of Death
spells.description: CON save or 7d8+30 necrotic (half on success). If a humanoid is killed by this spell, it rises as a zombie under your control at the start of your next turn.

spells.name: Forcecage
spells.description: Create an invisible cubic prison. Barred cage (20-ft cube) or box (10-ft cube, no openings). Teleportation and planar travel blocked. CHA save to try once.

spells.name: Mirage Arcane
spells.description: Make terrain of up to 1 square mile look, sound, smell, and feel like different terrain. Creatures that interact with the illusion can make INV check to disbelieve.

spells.name: Plane Shift
spells.description: Transport yourself and up to 8 willing creatures to another plane. Or: melee spell attack; hit creature makes CHA save or banished to random location on another plane.

spells.name: Power Word Pain
spells.description: Choose a creature you can see. If it has 100 HP or fewer, it is wracked with intense pain. The target's speed is halved, it has disadvantage on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws.

spells.name: Prismatic Spray
spells.description: Random beam hits each creature in cone (roll d8): red 10d6 fire, orange 10d6 acid, yellow 10d6 lightning, green 10d6 poison, blue 10d6 cold, indigo restrained-then-petrified, violet blinded-then-sent-to-plane, 8 = two beams.

spells.name: Regenerate
spells.description: Target regains 4d8+15 HP, then 1 HP per minute for the duration. Severed limbs regrow in 2 minutes if held to the stump.

spells.name: Resurrection
spells.description: Restore life to a dead creature dead ≤100 years. Must have most of body. Neutralizes poison, cures disease. Returns with full HP. Caster ages 1 year.

spells.name: Reverse Gravity
spells.description: All creatures/objects in 50-foot-radius, 100-foot-tall cylinder not anchored to the ground fall upward and hover at top. When spell ends, they fall back down.

spells.name: Teleport
spells.description: Teleport yourself and up to 8 willing creatures to a destination you've seen before. Familiarity determines accuracy (permanent circle = perfect, studied description = possible mishap).

spells.name: Antimagic Field
spells.description: 10-foot-radius antimagic sphere around you. No spells, magic items, summons, or other magical effects work within the sphere.

spells.name: Antipathy/Sympathy
spells.description: Choose an area or object and a creature type or specific creature. Antipathy: WIS save or flee if target enters range. Sympathy: WIS save or drawn to object/area.

spells.name: Clone
spells.description: Grow an inert duplicate. When original dies, soul transfers to clone (if willing, if clone is ready). Clone starts with same level and HP as original when it died.

spells.name: Demiplane
spells.description: Create a shadowy door on a flat surface that leads to a 30-foot-cube extradimensional space. Can furnish or alter the space.

spells.name: Dominate Monster
spells.description: WIS save or under your control. Works on any creature (unlike Dominate Person). Use bonus action to issue commands.

spells.name: Earthquake
spells.description: 100-foot-radius seismic disturbance. Concentration: DC 15. Standing creatures: DC 15 DEX save or prone. Ground: difficult terrain. Structures: 50 damage per turn.

spells.name: Feeblemind
spells.description: INT save or INT/CHA drop to 1. Can't cast spells, activate magic items, or understand language. Repeat save every 30 days.

spells.name: Glibness
spells.description: When making a CHA check, you can replace the number rolled with a 15. Additionally, no matter what you say, magic that would determine if you are telling the truth indicates that you are.

spells.name: Holy Aura
spells.description: Divine light wraps you and chosen creatures within 30 feet. Advantage on all saves, attacks against them have disadvantage, fiends/undead who hit them: CON save or blinded.

spells.name: Incendiary Cloud
spells.description: 20-foot-radius sphere of smoke and embers. DEX save or 10d8 fire (half on success). Moves 10 feet away from you each turn.

spells.name: Maze
spells.description: Banish a creature to a labyrinthine demiplane. DC 20 INT check to escape (as action). Minotaurs and deities auto-escape. Returns when spell ends.

spells.name: Mind Blank
spells.description: Target is immune to psychic damage, any effect that reads emotions or thoughts, divination spells, and the charmed condition.

spells.name: Power Word Stun
spells.description: If target has 150 HP or fewer: stunned (attacks against it have advantage, auto-fail STR/DEX saves, can't take actions). CON save at end of each turn to end.

spells.name: Sunburst
spells.description: 60-foot-radius sphere of brilliant light. CON save or 12d6 radiant damage and blinded for 1 minute. Undead and oozes have disadvantage. Creatures in magical darkness: not affected. Magical darkness in area is dispelled.

spells.name: Telepathy
spells.description: Mental link with a willing creature you know on the same plane. Either can share thoughts/sensory info as an action. Bonus action to suppress or resume.

spells.name: Astral Projection
spells.description: You and up to 8 willing creatures project astral bodies. Travel the Astral Plane and enter other planes. Silver cord connects to body. If cord severs: instantly dead.

spells.name: Foresight
spells.description: Touch a willing creature. For the duration: can't be surprised, has advantage on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws, and creatures have disadvantage on attacks against it.

spells.name: Gate
spells.description: Open a portal to another plane. Can also call a specific creature on another plane (no more than CR 20). Creature must make CHA save to resist the call.

spells.name: Imprisonment
spells.description: WIS save or imprisoned based on chosen form: buried, chained, hedged in, minimus contained, slumbering, or frozen in a sphere. Specific break conditions required.

spells.name: Mass Heal
spells.description: 700 HP of healing distributed among any creatures within range as you choose. Also ends blindness, deafness, and diseases on targets.

spells.name: Meteor Swarm
spells.description: Four 40-foot-radius spheres fall. DEX save. Fail: 20d6 fire + 20d6 bludgeoning. Success: half. Overlapping areas = multiple saves.

spells.name: Power Word Heal
spells.description: Restore all HP. End charmed, frightened, paralyzed, and stunned. The target can use its reaction to stand up.

spells.name: Power Word Kill
spells.description: If target has 100 HP or fewer: it dies. No saving throw. No other effects required.

spells.name: Shapechange
spells.description: Transform into any creature you have seen, CR = your level or lower (not a construct or undead). Use creature's physical stats, keep mental stats.

spells.name: Storm of Vengeance
spells.description: Massive storm (360-foot radius). Each round has different effect: acid rain, lightning, freezing hail, and finally 11d10 thunder in round 10.

spells.name: Time Stop
spells.description: Time freezes for everyone else. 1d4+1 turns to act alone. Ends immediately if any action affects another creature or an object another creature is carrying.

spells.name: True Polymorph
spells.description: WIS save for unwilling. Transform creature or object. If sustained for 1 hour: permanent. Creature→creature, creature→object, or object→creature.

spells.name: True Resurrection
spells.description: Resurrect creature dead ≤200 years. Body not required. Returns with full HP. Can even resurrect creatures killed by disintegration or power word kill.

spells.name: Weird
spells.description: Drawing on deepest fears of up to 10 creatures in 30-foot sphere. WIS save or frightened. Frightened: 4d10 psychic per turn. Repeat save each turn to end.

spells.name: Wish
spells.description: The mightiest spell a mortal can cast. Duplicate any spell of 8th level or lower, or reshape reality itself (DM's discretion). Stress: 33% chance to never cast Wish again after using beyond duplicating.
